name: a11y-skill
description: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit skill for AI coding agents — powered by @diegovelasquezweb/a11y-engine

scripts.sync: rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.claude/skills/a11y-skill/ && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.gemini/skills/a11y-skill/ && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.cursor/skills/a11y-skill/ && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.codex/skills/a11y-skill/ && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.codeium/windsurf/skills/a11y-skill/ && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='.audit' ./ ~/.gemini/antigravity/skills/a11y-skill/
